description: The 'LoanRiskCalculator' class in the 'fintech-risk-engine' project has complex approval logic but low test coverage. Achieve 100% line coverage and at least 90% branch coverage for 'LoanRiskCalculator.java' by adding comprehensive test scenarios to 'LoanRiskCalculatorTest.java'. Ensure all tests pass and cover various combinations of Credit Score, Income, Debt, and Loan Amount without modifying the 'LoanRiskCalculator.java' source file.
